description: Synthetic SnibeLis ASTM E1394 result upload for MAGLUMI X3 with assays/units absent from the channel mapping table: proves an unknown assay or unit is RETAINED and flagged (PARTIAL/UNMAPPED) for engineer review, never silently dropped or guessed (LIS-32). NOT a real instrument capture.

source.reference: synthetic seed (LIS-32 / S3.1); SnibeLis LIS User Manual v1.1 Appendix A result transmission example, plus deliberately-unmapped assays to exercise the missing-mapping review path
source.note: Application payload only, simplified SnibeLis ENQ/STX/content/ETX/EOT envelope. AFP and CEA are intentionally absent from the terminology block, and U/mL from the unit map, to assert the flag-for-review contract. NOT a real instrument capture. channel.tcp.port 12021 mirrors the planned dedicated X3 listener (LIS-174 plan D3, org.itech.ahb.listen-astm-server.snibe); channel.identity analyzer_id/host_id ('Maglumi User'/'Lis') are vision-extracted vendor-doc screenshot values, unverified — LIS-75 bench capture pins all of these (LIS-175).

terminology.note: Minimal synthetic MAGLUMI X3 seed (LIS-32) mapping ONLY TSH and the uIU/mL, ng/mL units — AFP, CEA and U/mL are deliberately omitted so their rows normalize to PARTIAL/UNMAPPED. NOT a complete or site-verified MAGLUMI dictionary.
